name: grosharp/pricing
title: Grosharp Pricing
description: Pricing table with repeatable plan cards — title, description, price, period, benefits list, CTA, and featured toggle.

heading.default: The right model for your growth stage.

text.default: Whether you need a one-time launch or a long-term growth partner, we have a model that fits. All engagements include direct access to our senior team.

default.title: Discovery Sprint
default.desc: A focused project to launch or refresh your digital presence fast. Ideal for new brands and funded startups ready to ship.

default.title: Growth Partner
default.desc: An ongoing design, development, and marketing retainer. We become your in-house digital team without the overhead.

default.title: Scale Package
default.desc: A fully scoped engagement for established brands undergoing a complete digital transformation or platform rebuild.
